title: Update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v3
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit) | `v2.3.6` → `v3.0.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v3.0.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.6/v3.0.0?slim=true) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the [Dependency Dashboard](../issues/18109) for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v3.0.0`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v3.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.6...v3.0.0)

##### Changes

- Add `gvisor-tap-vsock` network and port drivers ([#​515](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/515) [#​522](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/522), thanks to [@​fahedouch](https://redirect.github.com/fahedouch))
- Preserve real client source IP in builtin port driver via IP\_TRANSPARENT ([#​565](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/565), [#​577](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/577))
  - For Docker, preserving the source IP requires running `dockerd-rootless.sh` with `--userland-proxy=false`
- rootlesskit-docker-proxy: postpone removal to v4 ([#​569](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/569))
- Add build tags ([#​533](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/533), thanks to [@​fahedouch](https://redirect.github.com/fahedouch))

Full changes: <https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/16?closed=1>
Thanks to [@​arshia-rgh](https://redirect.github.com/arshia-rgh) [@​fahedouch](https://redirect.github.com/fahedouch) [@​yoshikawa](https://redirect.github.com/yoshikawa)

##### Install

```
mkdir -p ~/bin
curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download/v3.0.0/rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin
```

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
<https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/24208120213>
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 3c19a202bb653cc079a4dacc7f3c47f21161a4784d504f85ebaddc089c9cce8d .

</details>
